title: Can you use OAuth with a workspace view?
excerpt: Hi. I would like to build a workspace view that uses fetch to talk to a backend running on Monday code that then talks to the API (presumably authenticate with OAuth). Is that possible or would I have to use an Integrati…

posts.author: danielball (Daniel Ball)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi. I would like to build a workspace view that uses fetch to talk to a backend running on Monday code that then talks to the API (presumably authenticate with OAuth). Is that possible or would I have to use an Integration for that?

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @danielball, how have you been?
Everything you can do with our monday code oAuth is here on this doc
LMK if it helps
